accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.canonical_reserialization_rule: json.dumps(parsed, ensure_ascii=False, separators=(',',':'), sort_keys=True).encode('utf-8') must equal the exact pinned registry bytes
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.completeness_rule: membership is determined only from this complete hash-bound index; prepared-role rows, binding rows, implemented-schema rows, fixtures, and caller assertions may not be used to infer registry membership
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.input_requirement: exact caller-supplied registry bytes; recompute complete-file SHA-256; reject any mismatch before parsing
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.internal_relation_exclusion: i0a: structural relation IDs are not accepted-registry members and are validated only through StructuralRelationSchemaId/validate_structural_relation

known_valid_incompatible_counterexample.known_definition_basis: direct key prepared_claim_scope_v23 exists under accepted registry json_schemas

materialization_algorithm: parse the exact hash-matched registry bytes as canonical JSON with duplicate object keys rejected
emit json:<key> for every and only direct key of top-level json_schemas
emit table:<key> for every and only direct key of top-level table_schemas
sort emitted schema IDs by unsigned UTF-8 bytes
require emitted IDs unique and compute schema_ids_logical_sha256 as SHA-256 of LF-joined UTF-8 IDs with no trailing LF; empty is SHA-256 of empty bytes
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.parse_rule: After exact accepted registry SHA-256 success, finding4_registry imports json and calls json.loads on strict UTF-8 with object_pairs_hook=_reject_duplicate_json_object_pairs, parse_float=_reject_json_non_integer_number, parse_constant=_reject_json_constant; duplicate keys or canonical reserialization inequality are rejected.
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.unresolved_rule: content_schema_id absent from the complete index -> STOP_SCHEMA_REFERENCE_UNRESOLVED
accepted_registry_schema_definition_doma.valid_but_incompatible_rule: content_schema_id present in the complete index but compatible binding count is zero or greater than one -> STOP_CONTENT_SCHEMA_TARGET_BINDING_INVALID

assurance_separation_rule.binding: A1_REGISTRY_BINDING_RESOLVED proves only exact complete-registry membership plus one compatible frozen binding; it is not descriptor assurance
assurance_separation_rule.complete_descriptor_set: A2_DESCRIPTOR_SET_COMPLETE requires the complete descriptor array and, for SNAPSHOT_PUBLICATION, exact canonical snapshot claim-semantic bytes. PARTITION_PAYLOAD cardinality is derived only as len(validated snapshot_claim.partition_entries)
assurance_separation_rule.physical_exact: A3_EXACT_LENGTH_AND_SHA256_RECONCILED requires explicit expected byte length, explicit expected complete-file SHA-256, and supplied bytes; both expectations are verified uniformly
assurance_separation_rule.pinned_governing: A3_PINNED_GOVERNING_SHA256_VALIDATED is a separate fixed-hash assurance for exact accepted governing-package bytes and does not imply generic expected-length reconciliation
assurance_separation_rule.selected_sidecar: A6_DESCRIPTOR_SELECTED_SCHEMA_COMPLETE for json:sha256_sidecar requires A2_DESCRIPTOR_SET_COMPLETE, A1_REGISTRY_BINDING_RESOLVED, and independent A3 exact-length/hash reconciliation for both selected sidecar bytes and exact paired-target bytes
assurance_separation_rule.single_descriptor: A2_SINGLE_DESCRIPTOR_CLOSED_FIELDS validates one complete descriptor only; it never establishes unit cardinality, descriptor-set completeness, canonical-target uniqueness, or a complete sidecar graph
assurance_separation_rule.structural_sidecar: A fixed structural sidecar establishes only A3_EXACT_LENGTH_AND_SHA256_RECONCILED plus A3_STRUCTURAL_SIDECAR_PAIR_RECONCILED after independently derived target-path and paired-target exact-byte proof; it does not establish A4, either A6, A2, A7, or A8
assurance_separation_rule.structural_sidecars: All four structural sidecars can establish only A3_STRUCTURAL_SIDECAR_PAIR_RECONCILED after dual exact A3 and derived-target-path validation; they never establish A4 or A6.

binding_resolution_rule.private_candidate_matching_boundary: _resolve_compatible_binding_set returns only private match/cardinality outcomes and establishes no accepted-registry/frozen-production assurance
binding_resolution_rule.schema_identity_precondition: query.content_schema_id must be in exact accepted registry index and exact frozen-production binding row; role-row subset is never an alternative registry authority

disposition_axis_domains.interpretation: axes are independent; no single-descriptor result implies complete-set assurance, and no physical result implies descriptor or binding assurance

internal_structural_relation_schema_doma.prohibited_cross_domain_rule: No i0a: identifier may be passed to accepted-registry binding or membership APIs; json:/table: identifiers may not be passed to validate_structural_relation.

partition_payload_cardinality_authority.derivation: required PARTITION_PAYLOAD descriptor count = len(exact validated snapshot_claim.partition_entries); each descriptor at partition_ordinal k must bind the exact entry k
exact_descriptor_entry_binding: descriptor ordinal for PARTITION_PAYLOAD corresponds to the claim entry partition_ordinal under the complete descriptor ordering rule
partition_id parsed from the frozen PARTITION_PAYLOAD grammar equals partition_entry.partition_id
no independent count, path, identity, or logical-hash authority exists
partition_payload_cardinality_authority.sole_authority: exact canonical snapshot_publication_claim_semantic_v23 bytes supplied in DescriptorSetInput.snapshot_claim_semantic_bytes, fully validated and hash-bound before cardinality and descriptor-to-entry binding

path_grammar_ownership.authority_rule: I0A materializes exact frozen grammar IDs and templates from the canonical sources. Callers may select only a declared grammar ID; callers cannot construct, inject, override, or extend a grammar or placeholder domain.
path_grammar_ownership.canonical_json_rule: Persisted JSON object keys are lexicographic Unicode code-point order; schema field order is not stored key order.
path_grammar_ownership.import_rule: canonical.py <- finding4_registry.py <- prepared_evidence.py; no reverse import, duplicate table, caller-supplied grammar, or runtime registration.
path_grammar_ownership.prepared_unit_grammar_rule: All eight structural members and the object member have exact immutable templates. Full structural paths are derived only from run_id, unit_kind, prepared_unit_id, and member name; object paths additionally use object_ordinal_10d. Sidecar payload target_path is validation data, never path authority.
path_grammar_ownership.validator_rule: finding4_registry.validate_normalized_relative_path accepts FrozenPathGrammarId, resolves the immutable module-owned grammar and placeholder domains, and returns lexical assurance only. canonical.py owns no grammar table or path validator.

fence_sequence_20d.rendering: base-10, left padded to exactly 20 ASCII digits; parse then re-render must equal input

object_ordinal_10d.rendering: base-10, left padded to exactly 10 ASCII digits; parse then re-render must equal input

partition_id.normalization: none; lowercase ASCII is already canonical

run_id.normalization: none; lowercase ASCII is already canonical

snapshot_sequence_20d.rendering: base-10, left padded to exactly 20 ASCII digits; parse then re-render must equal input

canonical_target_grammar_bindings.schema_identity_source: accepted PATH_GRAMMAR_REGISTRY.json at scope_review_anchor; no name inference

claim_partition_entry_binding.failure_code: ERR_ROLE_CARDINALITY_INVALID for missing/extra entry; ERR_PATH_GRAMMAR_MISMATCH for malformed path; ERR_PLAN_UNIT_CROSS_MEMBER_MISMATCH for path/partition identity/logical hash mismatch after both sides validate

rows.conditional_cardinality: exactly len(validated snapshot_claim.partition_entries); one-to-one by partition_ordinal
rows.descriptor_set_scope: exact ordinal set/order, all conditional role cardinalities, canonical-target uniqueness, logical-hash nullability, and complete same-unit sidecar graph
rows.persisted_json_key_order_rule: lexicographic Unicode code-point order for every json:* payload; schema field order controls membership/projection only
rows.physical_sha256_requirement: A3 exact requires descriptor expected file_size_bytes, descriptor expected complete-file file_sha256, and supplied bytes; both are independently recomputed
rows.single_descriptor_scope: closed descriptor fields, role/unit/mode/path-shape, hash syntax, and role-local nullability only; never unit cardinality, target uniqueness, or a complete sidecar graph
